LAW AND MOTION DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 1ST AND 2ND CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MUST CLARIFY WHICH DEFENDANTS ARE IMPLICATED IN EACH CAUSE OF ACTION AND STATE FACTS SHOWING HOW C.H.W. IS A STATE ACTOR. IT ALSO APPEARS THAT THE LETTER FROM C.H.W. SENT CONCURRENTLY WITH THE REPLY AND ADDRESSED TO THE CLERK OF THE COURT MAY ONLY HAVE BEEN SENT TO DEPT. 302. ANY LETTER AND REQUEST FOR A HEARING SHOULD BE ADDRESSED TO THE CLERK'S OFFICE IN ROOM 103. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CATHOLIC HEALTHCARE WEST'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 1st and 2nd causes of action. Plaintiff must clarify which defendants are implicated in each cause of action and state facts showing how C.H.W. is a state actor. It also appears that the letter from C.H.W. sent concurrently with the reply and addressed to the clerk of the court may only have been sent to Dept. 302. Any letter and request for a hearing should be addressed to the clerk's office in Room 103. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
